ValidationRule.description: Container Competitor name is not blank then competitor Model is required
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule), OR( $RecordType.Name = "Container GENSET Quote",$RecordType.Name = "Container NT Quote"), OR( NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(CONTAINER_Competitor_Name__c))) && ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Competitor_Model_1__c), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(CONTAINER_Competitor_Name_2__c))) && ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Competitor_Model_2__c), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(CONTAINER_Competitor_Name_3__c))) && ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Competitor_Model_3__c) ) )
